name: Centenary United Holdings Limited
summary: Centenary United Holdings Limited operates as an integrated auto service provider in Zhongshan, the People's Republic of China. It sells new and used motor vehicles, as well as accessories, spare parts, car care services, and used vehicle warranty services; and provides repair and maintenance, insurance agency, and other value-added services. The company focuses on mid-to-high end sino-foreign and international brands. It also provides enterprise management information and enterprise investment consulting services. It operates through 14 4S dealership outlets, a quick fix auto center, 5 quick fix service points, and an insurance agency company in Zhongshan. Centenary United Holdings Limited was founded in 1999 and is headquartered in Zhongshan, the People's Republic of China.
